name: German Potato Salad (Kartoffelsalat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in their jackets in lightly salted water until tender.
2. Allow the potatoes to cool, then peel and slice them.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the remaining ingredients: vegetable oil, spicy mustard, vinegar (or lemon juice), and freshly ground pepper.
4. Taste the dressing and adjust seasonings as needed.
5. Pour the dressing over the sliced potatoes and mix well.
6. Marinate the salad for 30 minutes before serving.
7. Serve the potato salad warm or cold.
